title: bolbitis sagenioides
intro: Bolbitis sagenioides, also known as the Sagen's polypody or Sagen's spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a type of tropical fern native to Southeast Asia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. Bolbitis sagenioides contains compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which may contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, decoctions, or infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
